settings.title: FoF Impersonate
settings.require_reason: Require a reason to be entered before proceeding to impersonate another user.
settings.require_reason_help: The reason is recorded in the audit log (flarum/audit) and/or as moderator notes on both accounts (fof/moderator-notes), whichever is enabled.
settings.no_settings_available: No settings are currently available. Try installing fof/moderator-notes or flarum/audit

modal.title: Login as another user
modal.label: With great power comes great responsibility. By continuing, you will become {username} until you switch back.
modal.placeholder_optional: (Optional) Provide your reason for switching to this user
modal.placeholder_required: You must provide your reason for switching to this user before proceeding
